name: Paul Kalkbrenner
description: '''Paul Kalkbrenner''' ({{IPA|de|paʊ̯l ˈkʰalkˌbʁɛnɐ}}) (born 11 June 1977) is a German musician and producer of [[electronic music]]. Because he breaks down his tracks into elements that are reassembled onstage, Kalkbrenner is considered a live act, as opposed to a [[Disc jockey|DJ]]. He is most known for his single "[[Sky and Sand]]", which sold over 200,000 copies, went platinum, and was highly charted in countries such as [[Belgium]] and [[Germany]]. He is also known for portraying the main character Ickarus in the movie ''[[Berlin Calling]]'', written and directed by [[Hannes Stöhr]], which ran for several years at Kino Central in Berlin.
